subsections.title: Step Definition
content: Installation of docker (including docker-compose)

subsections.title: Participants
content: Role: Backend Engineer
Skills: Familiar with docker installation and usage
Quantity: 1

subsections.title: Input
content: Input Name: Install docker on Ubuntu series operating systems (Ubuntu-22.04, etc.)

Input Description: First ensure a cloud server is set up with resources meeting 'CPU >= 8 cores, Memory >= 32GB', and choose Ubuntu as the operating system. Once the server is running normally, complete the docker installation via command line operations
Resource Link: Docker Docs: https://docs.docker.com/

subsections.title: Output
content: Output Name: Runnable docker service
Output Description: Docker enables convenient installation of the Bisheng framework and related services required for this solution, so first ensure docker is correctly installed

subsections.title: Step Definition
content: Deploy Bisheng platform via docker

subsections.title: Participants
content: Role: Backend/Algorithm Engineer
Skills: Familiar with docker, master private deployment of common agent platforms (such as Bisheng, Dify, etc.)
Quantity: 1

subsections.title: Input
content: Input Name: Pull Bisheng image via docker

Input Description: First download the Bisheng project files from Github, which contains docker configuration files. After running the project files, it will pull the docker image for this solution from Bisheng's docker repository and start the service
Resource Link: Bisheng project files on Github: https://github.com/dataelement/bisheng

subsections.title: Output
content: Output Name: Available Bisheng platform service
Output Description: After running the Bisheng platform service, production-level agent workflows can be built through this platform

subsections.title: Estimated Time
content: 1-2.5 days

subsections.title: Step Definition
content: Download the pre-built workflow json file for this solution on Bisheng platform and import it into the running Bisheng platform

subsections.title: Participants
content: Role: Product Manager/Backend/Algorithm Engineer
Skills: Proficient in using common low-code (drag-and-drop) agent workflow building platforms (such as Bisheng, Dify, etc.)
Quantity: 1

subsections.title: Input
content: Input Name: Bisheng workflow json file
Input Description: Create a blank workflow on Bisheng platform and import the prepared json file into it
Resource Link: Bisheng Community - Featured Workflows (last row, author zh): Build 100 Workflows [Activity]

subsections.title: Output
content: Output Name: A brain teaser application to be run (agent workflow)
Output Description: This application meets the goals of this solution and supports version management, publishing, API calls, and other features

subsections.title: Estimated Time
content: 1 hour

subsections.title: Step Definition
content: Configure common large language models on Bisheng platform to support calls from various applications (workflows, agents, etc.) on the platform

subsections.title: Participants
content: Role: Backend/Algorithm Engineer
Skills: Master LLM configuration for common agent platforms (such as Bisheng, Dify, etc.)
Quantity: 1

subsections.title: Input
content: Input Name: API key and base url of the LLM to be used

Input Description: Configure LLM API related information in 'Bisheng Platform Model Management Interface' and set the default system model. This step recommends using LLM API based on SiliconFlow platform
Resource Link: SiliconFlow official website LLM page: https://cloud.siliconflow.cn/me/models

subsections.title: Output
content: Output Name: Configured LLM
Output Description: A configured LLM available for all applications on the Bisheng platform, no need to reconfigure for subsequent applications using existing models

subsections.title: Estimated Time
content: 2 hours

subsections.title: Step Definition
content: After LLM configuration is complete, find the previously configured application on Bisheng platform and click run to test the workflow. As an extension attempt, it is also recommended to read Bisheng's official workflow building tutorial, so you can adjust/build workflows yourself for personalized modifications

subsections.title: Participants
content: Role: Product Manager/Backend/Algorithm Engineer
Skills: Familiar with using common agent platforms (such as Bisheng, Dify, etc.)
Quantity: 1

subsections.title: Input
content: Input Name: Workflow usage options and interactions
Input Description: Select brain teaser type, start answering and other usage interactions
Resource Link: Bisheng official workflow building tutorial: BISHENG workflow

subsections.title: Output
content: Output Name: A runnable brain teaser application
Output Description: After testing passes, it can be directly published online

subsections.title: Step Definition
content: Combine with specific business scenarios to integrate the brain teaser workflow into existing processes via Bisheng's API

subsections.title: Participants
content: Role: Backend/Algorithm Engineer
Skills: Master at least one backend language (such as Python, Java, Go, etc.), familiar with HTTP-based API service encapsulation
Quantity: 1

subsections.title: Input
content: Input Name: URL and workflow_id after workflow publishing
Input Description: Generally given directly on the External Publishing - API Access page, then initiate http requests via Python/Java etc. to call the workflow
Resource Link: Bisheng official API tutorial for publishing workflows: Workflow External Publishing API

subsections.title: Output
content: Output Name: Independent API service based on this solution's workflow
Output Description: Can be flexibly embedded into related business systems
